runitor l ▹ g₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
lassociator (l · r) l g₂
• ((rassociator l r l ▹ g₂)
   • (((l ◃ ε) ▹ g₂) • (runitor l ▹ g₂))) =
(η ^-1 ▹ l · g₂) • lunitor (l · g₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
lassociator (l · r) l g₂
• ((rassociator l r l ▹ g₂)
   • (((l ◃ ε) ▹ g₂) • (runitor l ▹ g₂))) =
(η ^-1 ▹ l · g₂)
• (lassociator (id₁ b₁) l g₂ • (lunitor l ▹ g₂))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
((lassociator (l · r) l g₂ • (rassociator l r l ▹ g₂))
 • ((l ◃ ε) ▹ g₂)) • (runitor l ▹ g₂) =
((η ^-1 ▹ l · g₂) • lassociator (id₁ b₁) l g₂)
• (lunitor l ▹ g₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
((lassociator (l · r) l g₂ • (rassociator l r l ▹ g₂))
 • ((l ◃ ε) ▹ g₂)) • (runitor l ▹ g₂) =
(lassociator (l · r) l g₂ • ((η ^-1 ▹ l) ▹ g₂))
• (lunitor l ▹ g₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
lassociator (l · r) l g₂
• ((rassociator l r l ▹ g₂)
   • (((l ◃ ε) ▹ g₂) • (runitor l ▹ g₂))) =
lassociator (l · r) l g₂
• (((η ^-1 ▹ l) ▹ g₂) • (lunitor l ▹ g₂))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(rassociator l r l ▹ g₂)
• (((l ◃ ε) ▹ g₂) • (runitor l ▹ g₂)) =
((η ^-1 ▹ l) ▹ g₂) • (lunitor l ▹ g₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(rassociator l r l • ((l ◃ ε) • runitor l)) ▹ g₂ =
((η ^-1 ▹ l) • lunitor l) ▹ g₂

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
rassociator l r l • ((l ◃ ε) • runitor l) =
(η ^-1 ▹ l) • lunitor l

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(η ▹ l) • (rassociator l r l • ((l ◃ ε) • runitor l)) =
lunitor l

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(η ▹ l) • (rassociator l r l • ((l ◃ ε) • runitor l)) =
lunitor l • id₂ l

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
linvunitor l
• ((η ▹ l)
   • (rassociator l r l • ((l ◃ ε) • runitor l))) =
id₂ l

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(((linvunitor l • (η ▹ l)) • rassociator l r l)
 • (l ◃ ε)) • runitor l = id₂ l

      exact (internal_triangle1 Hl).
    Qed.
  End AdjEquivEssentiallySurjective.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_essentially_surjective l

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_essentially_surjective l

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
∑ (l0 : B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧)
(ζ₁ : invertible_2cell (l · l0) g₁)
(ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (l0 · m) g₂),
(ζ₁ ▹ m) • α = rassociator l l0 m • (l ◃ ζ₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
invertible_2cell (l · ?pr1) g₁
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
invertible_2cell (?pr1 · m) g₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (?pr1 · m) g₂,
 (?pr10 ▹ m) • α = rassociator l ?pr1 m • (l ◃ ζ₂))
  ?pr11

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
 exact (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1 g₁).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
invertible_2cell
  (l
   · adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1 g₁)
  g₁
 exact (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1_left g₁).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
invertible_2cell
  (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1 g₁
   · m) g₂
 exact (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1_right _ _ α).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (l · g₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell
          (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1
             g₁ · m) g₂,
 (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1_left
    g₁ ▹ m) • α =
 rassociator l
   (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1 g₁)
   m • (l ◃ ζ₂))
  (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_lift_1_right
     g₁ g₂ α)
 exact (adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective_eq _ _ α).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso l

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso l

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_univalent_2_1 B
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_full l
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_faithful l
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_essentially_surjective l

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact HB_2_1.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_full l
 exact adj_equiv_is_eso_full.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_faithful l
 exact adj_equiv_is_eso_faithful.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
l: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
Hl: left_adjoint_equivalence l
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hl: B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso Hl: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ b₂)
is_eso_essentially_surjective l
 exact adj_equiv_is_eso_essentially_surjective.
  Defined.
End AdjequivEso.

(**
 3. Esos are closed under invertible 2-cells
 *)
Section EsoClosedUnderInvertible.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
          {b₁ b₂ : B}
          {e₁ e₂ : b₁ --> b₂}
          (He : is_eso e₁)
          (α : e₁ ==> e₂)
          (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α).

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_full e₂

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_full e₂

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
∑ ξ : l₁ ==> l₂, e₂ ◃ ξ = k₁ × ξ ▹ m = k₂

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
l₁ ==> l₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
e₂ ◃ ?pr1 = k₁
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
(λ _ : e₂ ◃ ?pr1 = k₁, ?pr1 ▹ m = k₂) ?pr10

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
l₁ ==> l₂
 
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
e₁ · l₁ ==> e₁ · l₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
(?k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₁ l₂ m =
rassociator e₁ l₁ m • (e₁ ◃ k₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
e₁ · l₁ ==> e₁ · l₂
 exact ((α ▹ l₁) • k₁ • (Hα^-1 ▹ l₂)).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
((((α ▹ l₁) • k₁) • (Hα ^-1 ▹ l₂)) ▹ m)
• rassociator e₁ l₂ m =
rassociator e₁ l₁ m • (e₁ ◃ k₂)
 abstract
          (rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite p ;
           rewrite <- vcomp_whisker ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
e₂
◃ is_eso_lift_2 e₁ He Hm l₁ l₂
    (((α ▹ l₁) • k₁) • (Hα ^-1 ▹ l₂)) k₂
    (invertible_is_eso_full_subproof c₁ c₂ m l₁ l₂ k₁
       k₂ p) = k₁
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         use (vcomp_lcancel (α ▹ _)) ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
         rewrite is_eso_lift_2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite vcomp_linv ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)
(λ _ : e₂
       ◃ is_eso_lift_2 e₁ He Hm l₁ l₂
           (((α ▹ l₁) • k₁) • (Hα ^-1 ▹ l₂)) k₂
           (invertible_is_eso_full_subproof c₁ c₂ m l₁
              l₂ k₁ k₂ p) = k₁,
 is_eso_lift_2 e₁ He Hm l₁ l₂
   (((α ▹ l₁) • k₁) • (Hα ^-1 ▹ l₂)) k₂
   (invertible_is_eso_full_subproof c₁ c₂ m l₁ l₂ k₁
      k₂ p) ▹ m = k₂)
  (invertible_is_eso_full_subproof0 c₁ c₂ m Hm l₁ l₂
     k₁ k₂ p)
 apply is_eso_lift_2_right.
  Defined.

α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_faithful e₂

ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₂ ◃ ζ₂
p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m

l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₂ ◃ ζ₂

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B

α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₂ ◃ ζ₂
p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m
(e₁ ◃ ζ₁) • (α ▹ l₂) = (e₁ ◃ ζ₂) • (α ▹ l₂)

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B

α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₂ ◃ ζ₂
p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m
(α ▹ l₁) • (e₂ ◃ ζ₁) = (α ▹ l₁) • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₂ ◃ ζ₂
p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m
(α ▹ l₁) • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂) = (α ▹ l₁) • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
∑ (l : B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧)
(ζ₁ : invertible_2cell (e₂ · l) g₁)
(ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (l · m) g₂),
(ζ₁ ▹ m) • γ = rassociator e₂ l m • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
∑ (l : B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧)
(ζ₁ : invertible_2cell (e₂ · l) g₁)
(ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (l · m) g₂),
(ζ₁ ▹ m) • γ = rassociator e₂ l m • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂)

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B

γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
γhelp:= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g₂
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv)): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · g₂)
∑ (l : B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧)
(ζ₁ : invertible_2cell (e₂ · l) g₁)
(ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (l · m) g₂),
(ζ₁ ▹ m) • γ = rassociator e₂ l m • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂)

B: bicat

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B

He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
γhelp:= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g₂
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv)): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · g₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (?pr1 · m) g₂,
 (?pr10 ▹ m) • γ = rassociator e₂ ?pr1 m • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂))
  ?pr11

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
γhelp:= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g₂
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv)): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · g₂)
B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
 exact (is_eso_lift_1 _ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
γhelp:= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g₂
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv)): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · g₂)
invertible_2cell
  (e₂ · is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp) g₁
 exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  _
                  (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv))
               (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left _ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp)).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
γhelp:= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g₂
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv)): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · g₂)
invertible_2cell
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp · m) g₂
 exact (is_eso_lift_1_comm_right _ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₂, c₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
αinv:= make_invertible_2cell Hα: invertible_2cell e₁ e₂
γhelp:= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell g₂
     (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv)): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · g₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell
          (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp · m) g₂,
 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
    (rwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
       (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp)
       (inv_of_invertible_2cell αinv))
    (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp) ▹ m)
 • γ =
 rassociator e₂ (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp) m
 • (e₂ ◃ ζ₂))
  (is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp)
 abstract
        (cbn -[is_eso_lift_1_comm_left is_eso_lift_1_comm_right] ;
         pose (is_eso_lift_1_eq _ He Hm g₁ g₂ γhelp) as p ;
         cbn -[is_eso_lift_1_comm_left is_eso_lift_1_comm_right] in p ;
         use (vcomp_rcancel (Hα^-1 ▹ _)) ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite p ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso e₂

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso e₂

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_univalent_2_1 B
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_full e₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_faithful e₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_essentially_surjective e₂

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact HB_2_1.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_full e₂
 exact invertible_is_eso_full.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_faithful e₂
 exact invertible_is_eso_faithful.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂: B
e₁, e₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He: is_eso e₁
α: e₁ ==> e₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_eso_essentially_surjective e₂
 exact invertible_is_eso_essentially_surjective.
  Defined.
End EsoClosedUnderInvertible.

(**
 4. Esos are closed under composition
 *)
Section EsoClosedUnderComposition.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
          {b₁ b₂ b₃ : B}
          {e₁ : b₁ --> b₂}
          (He₁ : is_eso e₁)
          {e₂ : b₂ --> b₃}
          (He₂ : is_eso e₂).

  Section CompositionFull.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {m : c₁ --> c₂}
            (Hm : fully_faithful_1cell m)
            (l₁ l₂ : b₃ --> c₁)
            (k₁ : e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂)
            (k₂ : l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m)
            (p : (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m
                 =
                 rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)).

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁) • rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂)
 ▹ m) • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁
   ◃ ((rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂))
      • lassociator e₂ l₂ m))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁) • rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂)
 ▹ m) • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁
   ◃ ((rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂))
      • lassociator e₂ l₂ m))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m) • (k₁ ▹ m))
 • (rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m))
• rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁
   ◃ ((rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂))
      • lassociator e₂ l₂ m))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m) • (k₁ ▹ m))
 • (rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m))
• rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))
   • (e₁ ◃ lassociator e₂ l₂ m))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m) • (k₁ ▹ m))
 • (rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m))
• rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m =
((rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
  • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))
• (e₁ ◃ lassociator e₂ l₂ m)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
((((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m) • (k₁ ▹ m))
  • (rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m))
 • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker e₁
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator e₂ l₂ m)) ^-1 =
(rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
 • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
((((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m) • (k₁ ▹ m))
  • (rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m))
 • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m)
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₂ m) =
(rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
 • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• ((k₁ ▹ m)
   • ((rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m)
      • (rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m
         • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₂ m)))) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• ((k₁ ▹ m)
   • ((rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m)
      • (rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m
         • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₂ m)))) = ?b
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
?b =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• ((k₁ ▹ m)
   • ((rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m)
      • (rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m
         • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₂ m)))) = ?b

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m)
• (rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m
   • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₂ m)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
((rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ ▹ m)
 • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₂) m)
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₂ m) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m
• rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₂ · m) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• ((k₁ ▹ m)
   • (rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m
      • rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₂ · m))) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• ((k₁ ▹ m)
   • (rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m
      • rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₂ · m))) = ?b
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
?b =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• ((k₁ ▹ m)
   • (rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m
      • rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₂ · m))) = ?b

(k₁ ▹ m)

p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =

rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m
• ((e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂) • rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₂ · m)) = 
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

He₂: is_eso e₂

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧

k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
• (rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m
   • ((e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂) • rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₂ · m))) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))

He₂: is_eso e₂

• (rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m
   • (rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₁ · m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)))

(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ ▹ m)
  • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m)
 • rassociator e₁ e₂ (l₁ · m)) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂)) =
(rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
 • (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)) • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ k₂))

 • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m)

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B

He₁: is_eso e₁

He₂: is_eso e₂

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m

k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • rassociator e₁ e₂ l₁) ▹ m)
 • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m)
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
((id₂ (e₁ · (e₂ · l₁)) ▹ m)
 • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m)
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(id₂ (e₁ · (e₂ · l₁) · m) • rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m)
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · l₁) m
• (e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ l₁ m)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Definition composition_is_eso_full_lift_1
      : e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
      := is_eso_lift_2
           _
           He₁
           Hm
           (e₂ · l₁) (e₂ · l₂)
           (lassociator _ _ _ • k₁ • rassociator _ _ _)
           (rassociator _ _ _ • (e₂ ◃ k₂) • lassociator _ _ _)
           composition_is_eso_full_lift_path_1.

    Let ℓ := composition_is_eso_full_lift_1.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
(ℓ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
(ℓ ▹ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
(is_eso_lift_2 e₁ He₁ Hm (e₂ · l₁) (e₂ · l₂)
   ((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁) • rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂)
   ((rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂))
    • lassociator e₂ l₂ m)
   composition_is_eso_full_lift_path_1 ▹ m)
• rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
((rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂))
 • lassociator e₂ l₂ m) • rassociator e₂ l₂ m =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
rassociator e₂ l₁ m
• ((e₂ ◃ k₂)
   • (lassociator e₂ l₂ m • rassociator e₂ l₂ m)) =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
rassociator e₂ l₁ m
• ((e₂ ◃ k₂) • id₂ (e₂ · (l₂ · m))) =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂) =
rassociator e₂ l₁ m • (e₂ ◃ k₂)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Definition composition_is_eso_full_lift
      : l₁ ==> l₂
      := is_eso_lift_2
           _
           He₂
           Hm
           l₁ l₂
           ℓ
           k₂
           composition_is_eso_full_lift_path_2.

    
B: bicat

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
e₁ · e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_full_lift = k₁

    
B: bicat

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
e₁ · e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_full_lift = k₁

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁
• (e₁ · e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_full_lift) =
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁

ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂

• lassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ = lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁

        apply is_eso_lift_2_left.

((lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁) • rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂)
• lassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ = lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁
• (k₁ • (rassociator e₁ e₂ l₂ • lassociator e₁ e₂ l₂)) =
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁

      
B: bicat

rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • (k₁ • id₂ (e₁ · e₂ · l₂)) =
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁ = lassociator e₁ e₂ l₁ • k₁

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
composition_is_eso_full_lift ▹ m = k₂

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
ℓ:= composition_is_eso_full_lift_1: e₂ · l₁ ==> e₂ · l₂
composition_is_eso_full_lift ▹ m = k₂

      apply is_eso_lift_2_right.
    Qed.
  End CompositionFull.

e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_full (e₁ · e₂)

He₂: is_eso e₂

k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
∑ ξ : l₁ ==> l₂, e₁ · e₂ ◃ ξ = k₁ × ξ ▹ m = k₂

(λ _ : e₁ · e₂ ◃ ?pr1 = k₁, ?pr1 ▹ m = k₂) ?pr10

k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
l₁ ==> l₂
 exact (composition_is_eso_full_lift Hm _ _ _ _ p).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
e₁ · e₂
◃ composition_is_eso_full_lift Hm l₁ l₂ k₁ k₂ p = k₁
 exact (composition_is_eso_full_lift_left Hm _ _ _ _ p).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
k₁: e₁ · e₂ · l₁ ==> e₁ · e₂ · l₂
k₂: l₁ · m ==> l₂ · m
p: (k₁ ▹ m) • rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₂ m =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l₁ m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ k₂)
(λ _ : e₁ · e₂
       ◃ composition_is_eso_full_lift Hm l₁ l₂ k₁ k₂ p =
       k₁,
 composition_is_eso_full_lift Hm l₁ l₂ k₁ k₂ p ▹ m =
 k₂)
  (composition_is_eso_full_lift_left Hm l₁ l₂ k₁ k₂ p)
 exact (composition_is_eso_full_lift_right Hm _ _ _ _ p).
  Defined.

p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m

b₁, b₂, b₃: B

Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m

ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₂
p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m
(e₂ ◃ (ζ₁ ▹ m)) • lassociator e₂ l₂ m =
(e₂ ◃ (ζ₂ ▹ m)) • lassociator e₂ l₂ m

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
l₁, l₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
ζ₁, ζ₂: l₁ ==> l₂
p₁: e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₁ = e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₂
p₂: ζ₁ ▹ m = ζ₂ ▹ m
(e₂ ◃ (ζ₂ ▹ m)) • lassociator e₂ l₂ m =
(e₂ ◃ (ζ₂ ▹ m)) • lassociator e₂ l₂ m

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Section CompositionEssentiallySurjective.
    Context {c₁ c₂ : B}
            {m : c₁ --> c₂}
            (Hm : fully_faithful_1cell m)
            (g₁ : b₁ --> c₁)
            (g₂ : b₃ --> c₂)
            (α : invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)).

    Let γ : invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           α
           (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _).

    Let ℓ : b₂ --> c₁
      := is_eso_lift_1 _ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ.

    Let γ' : invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
      := is_eso_lift_1_comm_right _ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ.

    Definition composition_is_eso_lift_1
      : b₃ --> c₁
      := is_eso_lift_1 _ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'.

    Definition composition_is_eso_lift_1_left
      : invertible_2cell
          (e₁ · e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1)
          g₁
      := comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rassociator_invertible_2cell _ _ _)
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                 _
                 (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left _ _ _ _ _ _))
              (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left _ _ _ _ _ _)).

    Definition composition_is_eso_lift_1_right
      : invertible_2cell
          (composition_is_eso_lift_1 · m)
          g₂
      := is_eso_lift_1_comm_right _ _ _ _ _ _.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
(composition_is_eso_lift_1_left ▹ m) • α =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) composition_is_eso_lift_1 m
• (e₁ · e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_lift_1_right)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧

(composition_is_eso_lift_1_left ▹ m) • α =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) composition_is_eso_lift_1 m
• (e₁ · e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_lift_1_right)

   (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m
 • (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
    ▹ m)) • γ'
((rassociator e₁ e₂
    (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm
       (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
  • ((e₁
      ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
          (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂
          γ')
     • is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ 
         (e₂ · g₂) γ)) ▹ m)
• (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) composition_is_eso_lift_1 m
• (rassociator e₁ e₂ (composition_is_eso_lift_1 · m)
   • (e₁ ◃ (e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_lift_1_right)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p1:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ': (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m)
• γ' =
rassociator e₂ (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
  m
• (e₂
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
e₂ ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' =
(lassociator e₂ (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m
 • (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m))
• γ'

γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α

ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p1:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ': (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m)
• γ' =

  m
• (e₂
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ

   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator e₂
   (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m) ^-1

(is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m) • γ'

        exact (!p1).

e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p1:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ': (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m)
• γ' =
rassociator e₂ (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
  m
• (e₂
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
p1': e₂ ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' =
(lassociator e₂
   (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m
 • (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
    ▹ m)) • γ'
e₂ ◃ composition_is_eso_lift_1_right = ?t2

        exact p1'.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p1:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ': (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m)
• γ' =
rassociator e₂ (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
  m
• (e₂
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
p1': e₂ ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' =
(lassociator e₂
   (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m
 • (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
    ▹ m)) • γ'
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) composition_is_eso_lift_1 m
• (rassociator e₁ e₂ (composition_is_eso_lift_1 · m)
   • (e₁
      ◃ ((lassociator e₂
            (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m
          • (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
             ▹ m)) • γ'))) =
((rassociator e₁ e₂
    (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm
       (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
  • ((e₁
      ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
          (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂
          γ')
     • is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂)
         γ)) ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂)

   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁

(((((rassociator e₁ e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 ▹ m)

        m)

   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
(rassociator e₁ e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 ▹ m)
• (rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m
   • ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 m)

g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 m)
   • ((e₁
       ◃ lassociator e₂
           (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m)
      • ((e₁
          ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
             ▹ m)) • (e₁ ◃ γ')))) =
((e₁
  ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
      (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
 ▹ m)
• ((is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
    ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m
• ((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 m)
   • ((e₁
       ◃ lassociator e₂
           (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m)
      • ((e₁
          ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
             ▹ m)) • (e₁ ◃ γ')))) = ?b
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
?b =
((e₁
  ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
      (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
 ▹ m)
• ((is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
    ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂))

rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m

   • ((e₁

rassociator e₁

• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
(e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 m)
• ((e₁
    ◃ lassociator e₂ (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ')
        m)
   • ((e₁
       ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ'
          ▹ m)) • (e₁ ◃ γ'))) = ?t2

rassociator e₁

• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
(((e₁ ◃ rassociator e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 m)

     ◃ lassociator e₂

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B

g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧

 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
((e₁
  ◃ (rassociator e₂ composition_is_eso_lift_1 m
     • lassociator e₂
         (is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ') m))
 • (e₁
    ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m)))
• (e₁ ◃ γ') = ?t2

       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
(e₁ ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m))
• (e₁ ◃ γ') = ?t2

        apply idpath.

p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
((e₁
  ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
      (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
 ▹ m)
• ((is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
    ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂)) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m
• ((e₁
    ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m))
   • (e₁ ◃ γ'))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧

γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
p2:= is_eso_lift_1_eq e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
 ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) =
rassociator e₁
  (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) m
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
((e₁
  ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
      (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
 ▹ m)
• ((is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ
    ▹ m) • (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂)) = ?b

rassociator e₁

• (e₁

       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
?b =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m

    ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m))

       (e₂ · g₂) γ)
(is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ ▹ m)
• (α • rassociator e₁ e₂ g₂) = ?t2

        exact p2.

(((e₁

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B

ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
(rassociator e₁
   (e₂
    · is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm
        (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
   m
 • (e₁
    ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
         (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂
         γ' ▹ m)))

   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) =

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
rassociator e₁
  (e₂
   · is_eso_lift_1 e₂ He₂ Hm
       (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ')
  m
• ((e₁
    ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
         (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂
         γ' ▹ m))
   • (e₁
      ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁
          (e₂ · g₂) γ)) =
rassociator e₁ (e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1) m
• ((e₁
    ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m))
   • (e₁ ◃ γ'))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
γ:= comp_of_invertible_2cell α
  (rassociator_invertible_2cell e₁ e₂ g₂): invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · (e₂ · g₂))
ℓ:= is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: B ⟦ b₂, c₁ ⟧
γ':= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ: invertible_2cell (ℓ · m) (e₂ · g₂)
(e₁
 ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm
      (is_eso_lift_1 e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) g₂ γ'
    ▹ m))
• (e₁
   ◃ is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e₁ He₁ Hm g₁ (e₂ · g₂) γ) =
(e₁ ◃ (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e₂ He₂ Hm ℓ g₂ γ' ▹ m))
• (e₁ ◃ γ')

      apply idpath.
    Qed.
  End CompositionEssentiallySurjective.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_essentially_surjective (e₁ · e₂)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_essentially_surjective (e₁ · e₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
∑ (l : B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧)
(ζ₁ : invertible_2cell (e₁ · e₂ · l) g₁)
(ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (l · m) g₂),
(ζ₁ ▹ m) • α =
rassociator (e₁ · e₂) l m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₂)

    
B: bicat

b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧

m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

He₂: is_eso e₂
