m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
invertible_2cell (e₁ · e₂ · ?pr1) g₁
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
invertible_2cell (?pr1 · m) g₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell (?pr1 · m) g₂,
 (?pr10 ▹ m) • α =
 rassociator (e₁ · e₂) ?pr1 m • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₂)) 
  ?pr11

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
B ⟦ b₃, c₁ ⟧
 exact (composition_is_eso_lift_1 Hm _ _ α).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
invertible_2cell
  (e₁ · e₂ · composition_is_eso_lift_1 Hm g₁ g₂ α) g₁
 exact (composition_is_eso_lift_1_left Hm _ _ α).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
invertible_2cell
  (composition_is_eso_lift_1 Hm g₁ g₂ α · m) g₂
 exact (composition_is_eso_lift_1_right Hm _ _ α).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
c₁, c₂: B
m: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
g₁: B ⟦ b₁, c₁ ⟧
g₂: B ⟦ b₃, c₂ ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (g₁ · m) (e₁ · e₂ · g₂)
(λ ζ₂ : invertible_2cell
          (composition_is_eso_lift_1 Hm g₁ g₂ α · m)
          g₂,
 (composition_is_eso_lift_1_left Hm g₁ g₂ α ▹ m) • α =
 rassociator (e₁ · e₂)
   (composition_is_eso_lift_1 Hm g₁ g₂ α) m
 • (e₁ · e₂ ◃ ζ₂))
  (composition_is_eso_lift_1_right Hm g₁ g₂ α)
 exact (composition_is_eso_lift_1_eq Hm _ _ α).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso (e₁ · e₂)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso (e₁ · e₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_univalent_2_1 B
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_full (e₁ · e₂)
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_faithful (e₁ · e₂)
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_essentially_surjective (e₁ · e₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_univalent_2_1 B
 exact HB_2_1.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_full (e₁ · e₂)
 exact composition_is_eso_full.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_faithful (e₁ · e₂)
 exact composition_is_eso_faithful.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
b₁, b₂, b₃: B
e₁: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e₁
e₂: B ⟦ b₂, b₃ ⟧
He₂: is_eso e₂
is_eso_essentially_surjective (e₁ · e₂)
 exact composition_is_eso_essentially_surjective.
  Defined.
End EsoClosedUnderComposition.

(**
 5. Eso+ff implies adjoint equivalence
 *)
Section EsoAndFF.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {b₁ b₂ : B}
          {e : b₁ --> b₂}
          (He₁ : is_eso e)
          (He₂ : fully_faithful_1cell e).

  Let α : invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lunitor_invertible_2cell _)
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _).

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
left_equivalence e

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
left_equivalence e

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
id₁ b₁ ==> e · ?pr1
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
(λ _ : id₁ b₁ ==> e · ?pr1, ?pr1 · e ==> id₁ b₂) ?pr10
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
B ⟦ b₂, b₁ ⟧
 exact (is_eso_lift_1 _ He₁ He₂ (id₁ _) (id₁ _) α).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
id₁ b₁ ==>
e · is_eso_lift_1 e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left _ He₁ He₂ (id₁ _) (id₁ _) α)).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
(λ _ : id₁ b₁ ==>
       e · is_eso_lift_1 e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α,
 is_eso_lift_1 e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α · e ==>
 id₁ b₂)
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁)
        (id₁ b₂) α))
 exact ((is_eso_lift_1_comm_right _ He₁ He₂ (id₁ _) (id₁ _) α)).
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (is_eso_lift_1 e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α,,
      inv_of_invertible_2cell
        (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁)
           (id₁ b₂) α),,
      is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁)
        (id₁ b₂) α))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (is_eso_lift_1 e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂)
               α,,
             inv_of_invertible_2cell
               (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e He₁ He₂
                  (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α),,
             is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He₁ He₂
               (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (is_eso_lift_1 e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁) (id₁ b₂) α,,
       inv_of_invertible_2cell
         (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁)
            (id₁ b₂) α),,
       is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁)
         (id₁ b₂) α)))
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (is_eso_lift_1_comm_left e He₁ He₂ (id₁ b₁)
        (id₁ b₂) α))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
left_adjoint_equivalence e

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
left_adjoint_equivalence e

    
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
e: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
He₁: is_eso e
He₂: fully_faithful_1cell e
α:= comp_of_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor_invertible_2cell e)
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (id₁ b₁ · e) (e · id₁ b₂)
left_equivalence e

    exact eso_ff_is_equiv.
  Defined.
End EsoAndFF.

(**
 6. Factoring esos via ffs
 *)
(**
 If we can factor an eso

            e
     x₁ -----------> x₂

 as
     x₁ ---> x₂ ---> x₃
         f       m

 where m is ff, then m is an equivalence

 Note: this property only holds for esos and it doesn't generalize to
 arbitrary classes of morphisms defined via lifting properties.
 *)
Section FactorEso.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x₁ x₂ x₃ : B}
          {e : x₁ --> x₃}
          (He : is_eso e)
          {f : x₁ --> x₂}
          {m : x₂ --> x₃}
          (Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m)
          (γ : invertible_2cell (f · m) e).

  Let γ' : invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell γ (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _).

  Let inv : x₃ --> x₂
    := is_eso_lift_1 _ He Hm f (id₁ _) γ'.
  Let ε : invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
    := is_eso_lift_1_comm_right _ He Hm f (id₁ _) γ'.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
left_equivalence m

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
left_equivalence m

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
id₁ x₂ ==> m · ?pr1
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
(λ _ : id₁ x₂ ==> m · ?pr1, ?pr1 · m ==> id₁ x₃) ?pr10
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
 exact inv.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
id₁ x₂ ==> m · inv
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
id₁ x₂ · m ==> m · inv · m

      exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _ • (m ◃ ε^-1) • lassociator _ _ _).
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
(λ _ : id₁ x₂ ==> m · inv, inv · m ==> id₁ x₃)
  (fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
     (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
      • lassociator m inv m))
 exact ε.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (inv,,
      fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
        (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
         • lassociator m inv m),, ε))
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (inv,,
      fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
        (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
         • lassociator m inv m),, ε) ▹ m)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
   • lassociator m inv m)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
   • lassociator m inv m)

      is_iso.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (inv,,
             fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
               (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m)
                 • (m ◃ ε ^-1)) • lassociator m inv m),,
             ε)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (inv,,
       fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
         (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
          • lassociator m inv m),, ε)))
  (fully_faithful_to_conservative Hm x₂ (id₁ x₂)
     (m
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (inv,,
           fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
             (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m)
               • (m ◃ ε ^-1)) • lassociator m inv m),,
           ε))
     (left_adjoint_unit
        (inv,,
         fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hm
           (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
            • lassociator m inv m),, ε))
     (eq_is_invertible_2cell
        (! fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map_eq Hm
             (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m)
               • (m ◃ ε ^-1)) • lassociator m inv m))
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor m)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor m))
              (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker m
                 (is_invertible_2cell_inv ε)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator m inv m)
         :
         is_invertible_2cell
           (((lunitor m • rinvunitor m) • (m ◃ ε ^-1))
            • lassociator m inv m))))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
left_adjoint_equivalence m

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
left_adjoint_equivalence m

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃: B
e: B ⟦ x₁, x₃ ⟧
He: is_eso e
f: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
m: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
Hm: fully_faithful_1cell m
γ: invertible_2cell (f · m) e
γ':= comp_of_invertible_2cell γ
  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell e): invertible_2cell (f · m) (e · id₁ x₃)
inv:= is_eso_lift_1 e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': B ⟦ x₃, x₂ ⟧
ε:= is_eso_lift_1_comm_right e He Hm f (id₁ x₃) γ': invertible_2cell (inv · m) (id₁ x₃)
left_equivalence m

    exact factor_eso_ff_equiv.
  Defined.
End FactorEso.
